verses.text: Topa in, “Kei' ngimna hilopi-in thu vaihawmna a semkhia, kei' lungsim lopi-in kipawlna dang a bawl manun khialhna a bawl thuahthuah; keimah thu hong dong lopi-in Faro' hutna sung a bel ding leh Egypt' liahna a zong dingin Egypt gamah paisuk dingin a kuankhia, a lehdo mite in gimna ngah ta hen
Tua ahih ciangin Faro' hutna pen na maizumna uh hi ding a, Egypt liahna sungah na bukna uh nomau' zahhuaina hi ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' uliante Zoan khua-ah va tung uh a, amau' tangmite in Hanes khua a va phak uh hangin
amaute tungah phattuamna a pia theilo, maizumna leh mindaina cihloh buang huhna leh phattuamna bangmah a pia theilo Egypt mite' hangin Judah mi khempeuh in maizumna ngah ding uh hi,” a ci hi

Negeb gama om ganhingte tawh kisai thu hih bangin gen hi: Amaute in humpinelkai nu leh humpinelkai pa, gul gunei leh a leeng thei gulpi a omna, lungkhamna leh gimna gam nawkin, amau' hauhnate la nungzangah amau' sumte kalaoh tungah suanin, amaute tungah phattuamna bangmah a pia theilo mite tungah a puak uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt' huhna bangmah man loin a hawmpi ahi hi. Tua ahih manin, “Taang lo-in a tu hithiat Egypt,” ci-in min ka phuah hi
Tu-in pai in la, hong tung lai ding hunte-ah teci ahi ngitnget dingin amaute' mai-ah suangpeek tungah gelh in la, laibu khat sungah at in
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen a lehdo mite, a zuauthei tapate, Topa' thuhilhna a ngai nuamlo mite ahi uh hi
Amaute in thu mutheite tungah, “Mu kei un,” ci uh a, kamsangte tungah, “Kote' tungah thuman hong gen kei un. Kote tungah thuzol bek hong gen un la, thutak a hilote hong gen un
Lampi nusia-in, lamzin panin pial un la, Israel-te' Siangtho Pa' thu hong zasak kei un,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te' Siangtho Pa in, “Note in hih thu simmawhin, zawhthawhna leh khemna suangin, tuate muang na hih manun
hih mawhna pen note-a' dingin kulh sangpi khat khangkham a, lawtkhia-in a cim dektak, theihkholh lohin a cim vat tawh kibang ding hi
Tua cipna pen iplah ding om nawnloin a kidengkham beelsekpa' beel themte meikhuka om meilakna ding ahi zongin, tuikhuka om tui dipna ding ahi zongin a om nawn hetlo tawh kibang ding hi,” a ci hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Israel-te' Siangtho Pa, Topa Pasian in, “Kihei kikna leh khawlna bek tawh note in suahtakna na ngah ding uh hi. Daitakin omna leh muan'na pen nomau' thahatna hi ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin note na tuaci kei uh a

“Hilo! Sakol tung tuangin manlang takin i tai ding hi,” ci na hih uh ciangin note na taikhia ding uh hi. “Sakol zaptel tungah i tuang ding hi,” ci na hih uh ciangin note hong delh mite zong zaptel ding hi

Mual sang dawna om dial khuam ahi a, mualtunga limlahna tawh a kibangin ahi zongin, note hong kinusiat dong matengin, mi khat' tawn'na tawh mi tul khat tai-in, mihing nga' tawn'na tawh note khempeuh na taimang ding uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: A Mite tungah Pasian' Hehpihna Kamciam

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin note hong hehpih nuamin Topa in hong ngak a, note tungah hehpihna hong lah ding amah kipakta hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa pen a thutang Pasian hi a, amah a muangte khempeuh thupha ngah ahi hi
Jerusalem khuasunga a teng, Zion sunga om mite aw, note na kap nawn kei ding uh hi. Note' kahna aw hangin Topa in hong hehpih taktak ding a, amah in a zak ciangin note hong dawng ding hi
Topa in note tungah cihmawhna leh gimna hong tun'sak hangin amahmah in note hong hilh ding a, note in amah na mu ding uh hi
Taklamah na kihei ciang uh ahi a, veilamah na kihei ciang uh ahi zongin, “Hih pen lampi hi, hih tawn un,” cihna aw, na nunglam panun na bil un a za ding hi

Tua ciangin note in ngun tawh a kizut na milimte uh leh kham a kiluan, a kisung na milimte uh na ninsak ding uh hi. Nin bangin tuate na thehthang ding uh a, tuate tungah, “Beimang ta un!” na ci ding uh hi
Khaici na tuhna dingun amah in guah hong zusak ding a, lei panin a piang an hoih tampi tak hong pia ding hi. Tua ni ciangin gankhahna, mun zaina-ah na ganhingte un lopa ne ding uh hi
Lo a kho bawngtalte leh late in kawbia leh tuka tawh a kitoksa an al ne ding uh hi
Na galte uh' tausangte pukin mi tampi a sih ni-in, mual sang leh mual neute tung khempeuhah luitui luang ding hi
Tua thamloin, Topa in ama mite' liamma tuamin ama satna meimate a damsak ni ciangin, khataang pen nitaang bang ding a, nitaang pen ni sagih sunga taangzah bangin a zah sagihin a taang ding hi.
En un, Topa' vangliatna leh a minthan'na vang, gamlapi panin kimu thei hi. Meikuang leh meikhu in ama hehna hong kilangsak a, ama kampaunate, mei bangin a kuang hi
Na khempeuh a tai tuikhang bangin ama mai-ah huihpi nungsak a, minam dangte nawtin sugawp a, amau' gitloh vaihawmnate a suksiatsak hi

Ahi zongin no Pasian' mite in ahih leh biakna pawi a kikham ni zana bangin la na sa ding uh hi. Israel-te a hu Topa' biakinn-ah a pai dingin tamngai aw gin'na zui-in a kuankhiate bangin na lungdam ding uh hi
Topa in heh mahmahna leh a kangtum thei meikuang sung panin vanging, huihpi, leh gialpi tawh, ama liatna minthan'na aw kizasakin, ama khut a vik sukna kimusak ding hi
Amah in a ciangkhut tawh a sat ciangin, Assiria mite in Topa' aw kihta mahmah ding uh hi
Topa in amaute gim pia-in ciang tawh a satna a gingte tawh kituakin khuang leh laia lasaknate tumin na gingsak ding uh hi. Amah in a khut vikin amaute a do ding hi

Assiria kumpipa a kihalna ding mei phualpi mun, sawtpekin kibawl khinzo hi. Kumpipa-a' dingin a baihsa-in kikoih a, a mi halna pen lianin kisangsak a, sing a sangpi-in vum venvan hi. Topa in kaat kuang hu sangkhia ding a, tua mei phualpi tawhkuang ding hi.
